mapper.sql: id, replay_id, veh_import_data_id, batch_num, event_type, operator_id, operator_name, reason, status, total_count, queued_count, failure_count, failure_detail, started_at, finished_at, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_veh_import_event_replay ( id, replay_id, veh_import_data_id, batch_num, event_type, operator_id, operator_name, reason, status, total_count, queued_count, failure_count, failure_detail, started_at, finished_at, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{replayId}, #{vehImportDataId}, #{batchNum}, #{eventType}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorName}, #{reason}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{queuedCount}, #{failureCount}, #{failureDetail}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_veh_import_event_replay t SET
t.status = #{status},
t.total_count = #{totalCount},
t.queued_count = #{queuedCount},
t.failure_count = #{failureCount},
t.failure_detail = #{failureDetail},
t.started_at = #{startedAt},
t.finished_at = #{finishedAt},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_veh_import_event_replay t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM tb_veh_import_event_replay t WHERE t.id = #{value}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tb_veh_import_event_replay t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT FROM tb_veh_import_event_replay t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
ORDER BY t.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_veh_import_event_replay t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
